title: Create 1D
template:
from zoomy_core.mesh import BaseMesh
mesh = BaseMesh.create_1d(domain=({x_min}, {x_max}), n_inner_cells={n_cells})

mesh.write_to_hdf5("mesh.h5")
try:
    from zoomy_prepost import mesh_to_gmsh
    mesh_to_gmsh(mesh, "mesh.msh", boundary_group=None)
except Exception:
    pass  # .msh (dmplex/firedrake) — server has zoomy_prepost; local Pyodide skips

title: Create 2D
template:
from zoomy_core.mesh import BaseMesh
mesh = BaseMesh.create_2d(({x_min}, {x_max}, {y_min}, {y_max}), nx={nx}, ny={ny})

mesh.write_to_hdf5("mesh.h5")
try:
    from zoomy_prepost import mesh_to_gmsh
    mesh_to_gmsh(mesh, "mesh.msh", boundary_group=None)
except Exception:
    pass  # .msh (dmplex/firedrake) — server has zoomy_prepost; local Pyodide skips

title: Create 3D
template:
from zoomy_core.mesh import BaseMesh
mesh = BaseMesh.create_3d(({x_min}, {x_max}, {y_min}, {y_max}, {z_min}, {z_max}), nx={nx}, ny={ny}, nz={nz})

mesh.write_to_hdf5("mesh.h5")
try:
    from zoomy_prepost import mesh_to_gmsh
    mesh_to_gmsh(mesh, "mesh.msh", boundary_group=None)
except Exception:
    pass  # .msh (dmplex/firedrake) — server has zoomy_prepost; local Pyodide skips

title: Channel Quad 2D
description: placeholder — curated list TBD. A quad channel from the meshes catalog; fetched on demand from zoomylab.github.io/meshes.

title: Confluence Junction 2D
description: Y-junction confluence channel (mono, single domain) from the meshes catalog. The Hsu-1998 30-degree confluence coupling variant (confluence_hsu: mono mesh_2d + 4-part part_* split) is staged in the meshes repo but not yet published to the Pages catalog.

title: Curved Open Channel (Steffler/Ghamry bend)
description: Curved open-channel bend (Steffler/Ghamry secondary-flow case) from the meshes catalog.

title: Pumped-Storage Hydropower (monolithic)
description: Monolithic pumped-storage hydropower domain from the meshes catalog (the index.json complex/pump-power-storage category).
